name: local-vendor-marketplace
description: MERN hyperlocal marketplace for local vendors.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix customer-app && npm install --prefix seller-app
scripts.install:web: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.install:mobile: npm install --prefix customer-app && npm install --prefix seller-app
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.check:mobile: npm run check --prefix customer-app && npm run check --prefix seller-app
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm test --prefix backend && npm test --prefix frontend
